relationship_explanation: The complete ingestion capability spans IngestionManager, DocumentLoader, manifest utilities, Chunker, dense and sparse embedders, and dense and sparse persistence implementations; ingestion_manager.py is an orchestrator, not the sole owner.
The GHOST-versus-ragstream naming boundary applies across the ingestion package and requirement set and is not executable behavior owned by ingestion_manager.py alone.
The Knowledge Management parent boundary governs all ingestion components and their sibling interfaces; it is not implemented completely by one Python file.

The ingestion boundary is established collectively by ingestion components and the separate retrieval, evidence and memory implementations; ingestion_manager.py alone cannot establish the complete exclusion contract.

DocumentLoader, IngestionManager, file-manifest utilities, Chunker, Embedder, SpladeEmbedder, VectorStoreChroma and VectorStoreSplade are implemented in separate Python files; no single artifact owns the complete component decomposition.

ragstream/ingestion/ingestion_manager.py owns the ingestion run sequence, shared chunk IDs/metadata, dense and optional sparse branch orchestration, cleanup switches, failure propagation, statistics, and manifest publish ordering.
ragstream/ingestion/ingestion_manager.py owns document-root resolution and explicit failure when the configured root is missing or not a directory.
